description_long: This is a vintage-style green coupe car with a classic open-top design, reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles like the Ford Model T. The body is painted a vibrant green, with black fenders and a simple, upright windshield. The wheels are large, spoked, and painted gold, with thin black tires, giving the car a distinctive antique appearance. The interior features red seating and a gold steering wheel, visible through the open sides. The front grille is rectangular and black, flanked by two round headlights. The overall design is compact, with a short rear and a long, gently sloping hood.
description: A vintage green open-top coupe car with gold spoked wheels, black fenders, and red interior seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright windshield, rectangular black grille, and round headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open-top, gold spoked wheels, and red interior seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the car, the gold steering wheel, and the open seating area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open-top, gold wheels, and interior details.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
